forward_edge_contract.reverse_rule: derive reverse edges from core/doctrine_lattice_relations.json reverse_verb; do not hand-write dual reverse source edges

spec: Treat concept/mechanism relationships.edges as source forward assertions only.
Use relation registry reverse_verb to derive reverse projections.
Count planned target_status values as explicit residual states until target resolution lands.
Derive mechanism.evidenced_by.receipt from receipt_refs rather than embedding duplicate source edges.
queued_shared_lattice_change.reentry_condition: After controller releases doctrine_lattice.py and aggregate lattice surfaces, rerun doctrine-lattice read-only tests plus concept/mechanism validator and regenerate aggregate projections through the owner builder.
